title: rinorea deflexiflora
intro: Rinorea deflexiflora, a species of flowering plant in the family Violaceae, is commonly known as the Malaysian viola or viola of Borneo. The plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Southeast Asian cultures, to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties. Rinorea deflexiflora is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as provide relief from pain and inflammation. It is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is used as a natural remedy to boost immune function and promote overall well-being.
